name: orpal-web
description: Orpal web (PWA) shell — the same React UI + orpal-core running in any Chromium/modern browser, installable across desktop and mobile. Replaces the Electron main-process services (OS-keychain keys, SQLite history, disk file I/O) with browser equivalents (IndexedDB, File System Access / in-memory download) behind the same window.orpal contract.
